response.original_title: Journey to Safety: Making 'Tears of the Sun'
response.overview: This made-for-DVD documentary details the work that went into the production of "Tears of the Sun," the Bruce Willis/Monica Belluci movie about a Navy Seal who must decide between his orders and his conscience. Drama fans are treated to a behind-the-scenes look at the making of this film, as well as to interviews with the director and cast members, who give their insights into the efforts that were needed to bring this project to completion.
response.title: Journey to Safety: Making 'Tears of the Sun'
